summary: NN-tour upper-end correction closed by EXP-276 P3 swapA rewrite. New text states "the greedy nearest-neighbour heuristic gives 12,400 km from the most favourable starting station (Canary) up to ~18,800 km from the least favourable (Eskdalemuir)" — replacing the prior "16,400 km" figure (which was the Ebro-start NN length carried over from the pre-EXP-268 anchor).
note: See EXP-276 expansion file for full replacement_html (full_section_replacement of #p4-427-station-coverage).
